title: Implement a bounded evidence-backed Agent loop
prompt: Implement a recoverable Agent task loop. A configured Agent contract must run command evaluators after turn-end, persist each Attempt and Evaluation as auditable state/events, return structured feedback on failure, retry within budget, and mark the node done only after all criteria pass. Workflows without a contract must retain their old behavior.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Capability loop behavior tests and existing engine tests pass

evaluator.run: pnpm --filter @co/server exec vitest run src/engine/capabilityLoop.test.ts src/engine/kernel.test.ts

constraints: Use append-only events and node_states.output before adding dedicated tables
Distinguish acceptance failure from evaluator infrastructure failure
